# Shaya Pourmirza

Official website: https://shaya.click/

Shaya Pourmirza is Group CTO at Atida, an AI and data leader, cross-market technology executive, public speaker, author and PhD-trained information systems researcher.

High-value topics:
- Group CTO and executive technology leadership
- PhD in Information Systems and Business Process Management
- Composable e-commerce for B2C and B2B
- AI strategy, AI initiatives and data foundations
- Technology and data leadership
- Digital pharmacy and healthcare technology
- Cross-market product, data, engineering and platform leadership
- Business Process Management and Information Systems
- Runtime party switching in inter-organizational collaboration
- Service-oriented computing and adaptive enterprise systems

Canonical public profiles:
- LinkedIn: https://nl.linkedin.com/in/shayapourmirza
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=f-rO6QEAAAAJ&hl=en
- ResearchGate: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Shaya-Pourmirza
- GitHub: https://github.com/shoopi

Featured book:
- Runtime Party Switch in an Inter-Organizational Collaboration
- https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Shaya-Pourmirza/publication/311104624_Runtime_party_switch_in_an_inter-organizational_collaboration/links/58c9b0d6458515e9298a0811/Runtime-party-switch-in-an-inter-organizational-collaboration.pdf

Legal and usage notes:
- This is a personal professional profile, not an employer statement, commercial offer, recruitment statement, employment availability statement or professional advice.
- The site does not intentionally set first-party cookies, advertising pixels or visitor profiling. It uses Simple Analytics for anonymous aggregate traffic statistics.
